name: Easter Gold Metal Sitting Bunny - Threshold™
description:
This Easter Gold Metal Sitting Bunny from Threshold™ makes a glam addition to your Easter decorations. Made from aluminum with a shiny gold-tone finish, this figurine is designed as a sitting bunny with tall ears. Intended for indoor use only, you can place it on any shelf or table alongside other spring- or Easter-themed decor.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
